_template_info.instructions: Complete all fields. Save to docs/agent-log/registrations/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{agent-name}-{session-id}.json. This file must be committed as your first action in any session.

agent_registration.platform: REPLACE_WITH_PLATFORM (e.g. Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot)
agent_registration.entry_point: REPLACE_WITH_ENTRY_POINT (e.g. GitHub Issue #42, PR review request, direct task prompt)
agent_registration.active_thread_id: REPLACE_WITH_THREAD_ID from docs/active-threads.md, or NEW if creating a new thread
known_limitations: REPLACE_WITH_LIMITATION_2 (e.g. context window limit of X tokens)
agent_registration.preferred_handoff_format: REPLACE_WITH_FORMAT (e.g. JSON handoff record + inline comments)
